mapper.select: SELECT b.no,b.title,b.content,TO_CHAR(b.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday,b.hit, m.login_id as loginId,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.bno = b.no) AS replyCount FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY b.no DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
SELECT b.no, b.title, b.content, TO_CHAR(b.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday, b.hit, b.pwd, m.login_id as loginId FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.no = #{no}
